channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Swiss skier Lara Gut-Behrami gets 1st World Cup win of season. Lindsey Vonn finishes 13th
item.description: GARMISCH-PARTENKIRCHEN, Germany (AP) — Swiss ski star Lara Gut-Behrami has finally found a way back to winning ways, with next month's world championships looming.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 1 Auburn slips past No. 6 Tennessee 53-51 and extends its winning streak to 11 games
item.description: AUBURN, Ala. (AP) — Miles Kelly hit a go-ahead 3-pointer with 30 seconds remaining and Johni Broome had 16 points and 13 rebounds in his return to the lineup as No. 1 Auburn extended its winning streak to 11 games with a 53-51 win over No. 6 Tennessee on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Winnipeg hat trick sinks Utah HC, 5-2
item.description: WINNIPEG (AP) - Three goals ended Utah's three-game winning streak. Cole Perfetti scored his first NHL hat trick, including the go-ahead goal, for the Winnipeg Jets in a 5-2 win against the Utah Hockey Club at Canada Life Centre on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Whirlwind at Farmers Insurance Open; Wind Delay at Round 2
item.description: Another day spent at Torrey Pines, but it was not a quiet day by any means.. This course is already a difficult in itself, but try adding Santa Ana winds that gust up to 35 miles per hour? The gusts dealing the day an hour and a half suspension..
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: 49ers bring back Robert Saleh as defensive coordinator
item.description: (KRON) -- The San Francisco 49ers will fill their vacant defensive coordinator position with a familiar face. Robert Saleh will return to lead the team's defense after a tenure as the New York Jets' head coach, the 49ers announced Friday. Saleh was the 49ers' defensive coordinator from 2017-2020.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Michigan basketball seeks to end Mackey Arena drought vs. Purdue amidst shaky play
item.description: Through 18 games, the Michigan Wolverines have a shaky tendency that continues to rear its ugly head at the most inopportune times.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: LeBron James picked for 21st straight All-Star Game, extending NBA record
item.description: LeBron James is extending his All-Star records. And Giannis Antetokounmpo is the people’s choice, again. The NBA revealed the starters — some of them, anyway — for the revamped All-Star Game on Thursday night, and there wasn't much in the way of surprises.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: CMU Women's Lacrosse looks to rewrite history
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Colorado Mesa University women's lacrosse team has been a dominant force in the Rocky Mountain Athletic Conference, finishing in second place for four straight years. This year, however, the Mavericks are determined to rewrite history.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: USF Men's Tennis starts season off undefeated
item.description: The USF Bulls improved to 3-0 with victory at Stetson. The USF Men’s Tennis team earned a 5-2 win in their first road match of the spring season on Monday, Jan. 20.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: LIST: NBA All-Star 2025 events to take place in San Francisco, Oakland
item.description: (KRON) -- For the first time since in a quarter of a century, the NBA All-Star game is back in the Bay Area. The last time NBA All-Star weekend was in the Bay Area in 2000.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Philadelphia Eagles selling snow collected from NFC divisional win
item.description: The snow was collected, carefully preserved and authenticated by the grounds crew to allow fans to own a genuine piece of Eagles history, the team said.
item.dc:creator: Hayden Sherry, NewsNation

item.title: NFL playoffs: Championship weekend on tap as 4 teams vie for a trip to Super Bowl LIX
item.description: The road to Super Bowl LIX ends Sunday. It's championship weekend, and by the time it's all over, we'll know which teams will represent the AFC and NFC on Sunday, Feb. 9, in New Orleans to play for the Lombardi Trophy.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Four players with San Diego ties to play at 2025 Farmers Insurance Open
item.description: The 2025 Farmers Insurance Open kicks off Wednesday morning at Torrey Pines Golf Course in La Jolla with a purse of $9.3 million up for grabs over the four-day event.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Ohio State wins 1st national title since 2014, outlasting Notre Dame 34-23 in CFP championship game
item.description: Instead of crying over another collapse, Ohio State can celebrate another national title after holding off a Notre Dame comeback bid Monday night to walk away with a nailbiter of a 34-23 victory over the Fighting Irish.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Aho scores in overtime as the Hurricanes beat the Blackhawks 4-3
item.description: Sebastian Aho scored 59 seconds into overtime, and the Carolina Hurricanes beat the Chicago Blackhawks 4-3 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Ohio State VS. Notre Dame: Facts to know before the CFP Championship kickoff
item.description: The Buckeyes and Fighting Irish meet Monday night in the College Football Playoff national championship game at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, WGN 9
